name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
target_description: Bottom 40% vulnerable and deprived families as per SECC 2011 data and occupational categories
ministry: National Health Authority (NHA), Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
data_source: PM-JAY eligibility criteria from official pmjay.gov.in and myscheme.gov.in

rules.description: Eligible via EITHER: (1) AAY/PHH ration card as SECC/BPL proxy OR (2) urban occupation in PM-JAY's 11 eligible occupational categories (daily wage workers, vendors, artisans, domestic workers, ragpickers, drivers, washermen, etc.)
rules.ambiguity_note: SECC 2011 data is 15 years stale — many genuinely poor families may not appear. Urban occupational route covers the 11 PM-JAY eligible categories. Occupation values from the form map approximately to these categories.

rules.description: Exclusion criterion: households with monthly income above ₹10,000 (annual > ₹1,20,000) are excluded per myscheme.gov.in official central criteria
rules.ambiguity_note: Central rule. Several states (Rajasthan, Kerala, Delhi) have extended PM-JAY to higher income groups — if your state has extended coverage, you may still be eligible despite failing this rule. State-specific overrides are not yet modelled.

rules.description: Applicant must have an Aadhaar card for beneficiary identification
Exclusion: owns 2/3/4-wheeler vehicle, mechanized farm equipment, KCC >=₹50k, is govt employee, is income tax payer, owns pucca house. Source: myscheme.gov.in official exclusion list.
rules.ambiguity_note: Official exclusion also includes owning refrigerator AND landline (compound condition — not fully evaluated here as it requires both together). Missing fields in this exclusion rule return MISSING, not FAIL.

rules.description: Exclusion: owning 5 acres or more of agricultural land. 5 acres = 2.0234 hectares.
rules.ambiguity_note: Exclusion threshold is specifically for agricultural land. land_area_hectares may include non-agricultural plots — kept non-mandatory to avoid false exclusions.

benefit_summary: ₹5 lakh family floater health insurance per year for secondary/tertiary hospitalization at empanelled hospitals. Cashless and paperless.
name_hindi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना

application_offices.find_instruction: Find the nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in
